_doc: S2.1 bot registry. Bots here are owned by the S2.1 scaled-entry engine. NEVER also add these botIds to config/bots.json — that triggers a startup collision error in run-webhook.js, and would cause the legacy reconciler to attempt to drive S2.1 trades with the wrong credentials.

bots.dryRunLock: PAPER_ONLY — do not set dryRun:false without Ian explicit approval
